_meta.name: Refine Style Templates
_meta.description: 20 templates de estilo prontos. Cada estilo aplica APENAS tratamento visual (como filtro) sobre a foto original — não muda composição, sujeito ou cena. Use o campo 'prompt_suffix' concatenado ao prompt do usuário, ou 'system_instruction' como instrução do modelo.
_meta.preservation_rule: PRESERVAR composição, enquadramento, sujeito, expressões, poses e elementos da imagem original. APLICAR apenas: paleta de cores, contraste, granulação, tonalidade, processamento de cor e atmosfera de iluminação.

styles.name: #cinematic-anamorphic
styles.description: Visual de cinema com lentes anamórficas — lens flares horizontais alaranjados, oval bokeh, alto contraste cinematográfico.
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on anamorphic lens, horizontal lens flares, oval bokeh, cinematic teal and orange grading, 2.39:1 aspect mood, deep blacks, film grain, professional color timing, motion picture stock
styles.negative_prompt: flat lighting, oversaturated, digital look, sharp corners, video aesthetic
styles.system_instruction: Apply ONLY anamorphic cinematic look to the existing image. Preserve composition, subject, pose and framing exactly. Add: horizontal orange lens flares where appropriate, teal-and-orange color grading, deep contrast, cinema-style highlights and shadows, subtle film grain. Do NOT alter the subject's identity, position or expression.

styles.name: #kodak-portra-400
styles.description: Filme analógico clássico — tons quentes naturais, peles douradas, grão fino, alta latitude tonal.
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Kodak Portra 400, analog film, soft warm tones, natural skin glow, fine grain, slight haze, magic hour warmth, mid-contrast, film scan aesthetic
styles.negative_prompt: digital sharpness, oversaturated colors, harsh shadows, plastic skin
styles.system_instruction: Apply Kodak Portra 400 film emulation to the existing image. Preserve all subject details. Apply: warm natural tones, golden skin highlights, soft contrast curve, fine analog grain (medium intensity), slight halation in highlights, characteristic Portra magenta-yellow color cast.

styles.name: #fuji-velvia-50
styles.description: Saturação intensa estilo paisagem — verdes vibrantes, céus turquesa, vermelhos profundos.
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Fuji Velvia 50, hyper-saturated landscape film, vivid greens and blues, punchy reds, fine grain, high color density, professional landscape photography
styles.negative_prompt: muted tones, low saturation, washed out, gray skies
styles.system_instruction: Apply Fuji Velvia 50 emulation. Preserve composition. Boost color saturation especially in greens, blues and reds. Increase color density without crushing details. Add fine analog grain. Maintain natural skin tones if subject is human.

styles.name: #editorial-magazine
styles.description: Look de revista de moda — clean, sofisticado, contraste controlado, pele perfeita.
styles.prompt_suffix: editorial magazine style, Vogue aesthetic, clean color grading, controlled contrast, flawless skin retouching, sophisticated lighting, high-end fashion photography
styles.negative_prompt: amateur, oversharpened, flat colors, social media filter look
styles.system_instruction: Apply high-end editorial magazine treatment. Preserve subject and composition. Apply: clean controlled contrast, sophisticated color grading with restrained saturation, flawless skin (preserve natural texture), polished highlights, deep but detailed shadows, magazine-quality color timing.

styles.name: #vintage-70s
styles.description: Anos 70 — laranja queimado, mostarda, marrons, sub-saturação característica da era.
styles.prompt_suffix: 1970s vintage photography, faded warm tones, mustard yellow, burnt orange, brown shadows, light leaks, slight haze, sun-bleached look, period accurate color processing
styles.negative_prompt: modern, digital, blue cast, high tech, neon
styles.system_instruction: Apply 1970s vintage photo treatment. Preserve subject. Apply warm color shift (amber/orange dominant), reduce blue channel, add warm brown shadows, subtle yellow highlights, slight haze in highlights, period-accurate color fading, soft contrast.

styles.name: #noir-cinematic
styles.description: Preto e branco dramático com sombras profundas, contraste extremo, mood detetive.
styles.prompt_suffix: film noir, high contrast black and white, deep shadows, dramatic lighting, classic Hollywood, silver gelatin print, mysterious mood
styles.negative_prompt: color, soft contrast, modern digital BW, gray flat tones
styles.system_instruction: Convert to dramatic black and white. Preserve composition exactly. Apply: high contrast curve, crushed deep blacks (with retained shadow detail), bright but not blown highlights, silver-toned midtones, subtle film grain, dramatic noir mood.

styles.name: #polaroid-instant
styles.description: Foto instantânea analógica — cantos suaves, imperfeições cromáticas, look amador charmoso.
styles.prompt_suffix: Polaroid SX-70 instant photo, soft faded colors, slight green tint in shadows, warm highlights, vignette, slightly blurry edges, analog imperfection, nostalgic feel
styles.negative_prompt: sharp, digital, perfect, modern, high resolution feel
styles.system_instruction: Apply Polaroid instant film aesthetic. Preserve subject. Add: faded color palette, slight green/cyan tint in shadows, warm cream highlights, soft focus near edges, subtle vignette, slight color shift, characteristic Polaroid imperfections.

styles.name: #moody-dark
styles.description: Atmosfera densa e escura — sombras dominantes, highlights controlados, dramático moderno.
styles.prompt_suffix: moody dark photography, low-key lighting, deep shadows, controlled highlights, atmospheric, dramatic, modern dark aesthetic, rich blacks
styles.negative_prompt: bright, overexposed, washed out, flat lighting, high-key
styles.system_instruction: Apply moody dark grading. Preserve composition. Apply: lifted shadows with retained detail, deep rich blacks, controlled highlights (pulled down), reduced overall exposure, slight warm cast in midtones, atmospheric quality.

styles.name: #anime-cel-shaded
styles.description: Estilo anime moderno com cel shading — cores chapadas, contornos nítidos, look 2D.
styles.prompt_suffix: anime cel-shaded illustration, flat color regions, clean line art, vibrant colors, Japanese animation style, Studio Ghibli inspired, 2D look, anime art
styles.negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3D render, painted texture, oil painting, realistic skin
styles.system_instruction: Convert to anime cel-shaded illustration. Preserve composition, pose and identity. Apply: flat color regions instead of realistic gradients, clean dark line art on edges, simplified shadow shapes, vibrant saturated colors, anime-style hair/eye treatment, 2D animation aesthetic.

styles.name: #watercolor-painting
styles.description: Aquarela suave — transparências, bordas molhadas, papel texturizado, paleta artística.
styles.prompt_suffix: watercolor painting, soft wet edges, paper texture, transparent washes, bleeding colors, artistic brush strokes, traditional media, hand-painted
styles.negative_prompt: digital, sharp, photorealistic, smooth gradients, flat color
styles.system_instruction: Convert to watercolor painting. Preserve composition and subject. Apply: soft wet edges instead of hard lines, transparent overlapping washes, visible paper texture, slight color bleeding, hand-painted brush stroke quality, muted artistic palette.

styles.name: #oil-painting-classic
styles.description: Óleo clássico estilo Velho Mestre — pinceladas visíveis, cores ricas, drama renascentista.
styles.prompt_suffix: classical oil painting, visible brush strokes, rich impasto texture, Old Masters style, Rembrandt lighting, deep chiaroscuro, museum quality, traditional fine art
styles.negative_prompt: digital, photographic, smooth, modern, illustration, flat
styles.system_instruction: Convert to classical oil painting. Preserve composition. Apply: thick visible brush strokes, rich impasto texture, Old Masters color palette (warm earth tones, deep shadows), Rembrandt-style chiaroscuro lighting, oil paint material quality, museum aesthetic.

styles.name: #pixel-art-retro
styles.description: Pixel art 16-bit — paleta limitada, dithering visível, estética de jogo retrô.
styles.prompt_suffix: 16-bit pixel art, limited color palette, visible pixels, dithering pattern, retro video game aesthetic, SNES era graphics, blocky resolution
styles.negative_prompt: smooth, high resolution, anti-aliased, photorealistic, modern
styles.system_instruction: Convert to 16-bit pixel art. Preserve composition and subject identification. Apply: visible square pixels (256-512 effective resolution), limited 32-color palette, dithering for gradients, retro video game aesthetic (SNES/Genesis era), no anti-aliasing.

styles.name: #3d-render-octane
styles.description: Render 3D fotorrealista estilo Octane — materiais perfeitos, iluminação física, alta qualidade.
styles.prompt_suffix: Octane render, photorealistic 3D, physically based materials, ray-traced lighting, ultra detailed, studio lighting, product visualization quality, 8K render
styles.negative_prompt: 2D, illustration, painting, low quality, video game graphics
styles.system_instruction: Apply photorealistic 3D Octane render aesthetic. Preserve composition. Apply: physically-based materials with realistic surface properties, ray-traced reflections and shadows, studio-quality lighting setup, ultra-sharp detail, render-perfect color accuracy, professional 3D look.

styles.name: #claymation-stop-motion
styles.description: Stop-motion de massinha — texturas de barro, imperfeições charmosas, estilo Aardman.
styles.prompt_suffix: claymation stop-motion, plasticine clay texture, handmade aesthetic, Wallace and Gromit style, Aardman Animations, slight finger marks, charming imperfection
styles.negative_prompt: smooth, digital, photorealistic, perfect surfaces
styles.system_instruction: Convert to claymation stop-motion aesthetic. Preserve composition. Apply: plasticine clay surface texture with visible thumbprints, slight asymmetric handmade quality, soft sculpted forms, Aardman Animations-inspired style, charming imperfections.

styles.name: #lowpoly-geometric
styles.description: Geometria simplificada — facetas triangulares visíveis, paleta limitada, estética minimalista.
styles.prompt_suffix: low poly 3D art, geometric faceted surfaces, triangular polygons, flat shading, limited color palette, minimalist 3D aesthetic, isometric clean
styles.negative_prompt: smooth surfaces, high detail, realistic textures, organic curves
styles.system_instruction: Convert to low poly 3D art. Preserve general composition. Apply: simplified geometric forms with visible triangular facets, flat shading per polygon, limited harmonious color palette, no smooth gradients, minimalist 3D aesthetic.

styles.name: #neon-cyberpunk
styles.description: Cyberpunk noturno — neons saturados, atmosfera úmida, contrastes magenta/cyan.
styles.prompt_suffix: cyberpunk neon aesthetic, saturated magenta and cyan, wet streets reflections, night atmosphere, Blade Runner mood, neon glow, futuristic city vibes
styles.negative_prompt: daylight, natural colors, suburban, retro, warm tones only
styles.system_instruction: Apply cyberpunk neon treatment. Preserve composition. Apply: heavy magenta-cyan color split, neon glow on highlights, deep navy/purple shadows, wet reflective surfaces feel, slight haze, Blade Runner atmospheric mood. Maintain orange (#ff6a1a) as accent color where applicable.

styles.name: #minimalist-bw
styles.description: Minimalismo monocromático — composição limpa, espaço negativo, elegância sutil.
styles.prompt_suffix: minimalist black and white, clean composition, negative space, subtle elegance, modern editorial, refined aesthetic, gallery quality
styles.negative_prompt: busy, cluttered, colorful, decorative, ornate
styles.system_instruction: Convert to minimalist monochrome. Preserve subject. Apply: clean black-to-white tonality, refined contrast curve (soft midtones), gallery-quality finish, subtle silver-toned shadows, no warm or cool cast, museum-print aesthetic.

styles.name: #risograph-print
styles.description: Impressão Risograph — registro torto, paleta limitada de duas cores, textura de impressão.
styles.prompt_suffix: risograph print aesthetic, two-color screen printing, slight registration offset, paper texture, limited spot color palette, indie zine style, halftone patterns
styles.negative_prompt: high resolution, perfect alignment, photographic, full color
styles.system_instruction: Apply Risograph print aesthetic. Preserve composition. Apply: limited 2-color spot palette (typically warm + cool), slight color registration offset, halftone dot patterns, paper grain texture, indie print zine quality.

styles.name: #vaporwave-aesthetic
styles.description: Estética vaporwave — pastel + neon, glitches sutis, mood retrofuturista anos 90.
styles.prompt_suffix: vaporwave aesthetic, pastel pink and cyan, retrofuturism, 90s nostalgia, dreamy haze, gradient sky, surreal atmosphere, lo-fi quality
styles.negative_prompt: modern, sharp, professional, monochrome
styles.system_instruction: Apply vaporwave aesthetic. Preserve composition. Apply: pastel pink-cyan color shift, dreamy hazy quality, slight chromatic aberration, retrofuturistic mood, soft contrast, nostalgic 90s feel. Add subtle gradient atmosphere.

styles.name: #tilt-shift-miniature
styles.description: Efeito miniatura — desfoque seletivo top/bottom, saturação realçada, look de maquete.
styles.prompt_suffix: tilt-shift photography, miniature effect, selective focus center band, blurred top and bottom, saturated colors, toy-like appearance, model city look
styles.negative_prompt: uniform focus, flat colors, realistic depth
styles.system_instruction: Apply tilt-shift miniature effect. Preserve composition. Apply: sharp focus on horizontal center band only, gradual blur toward top and bottom edges, slightly boosted saturation, toy-model aesthetic. Subject in focus stays sharp.

styles.name: #double-exposure
styles.description: Sobreposição artística — silhueta e cena/textura combinadas, mood etéreo.
styles.prompt_suffix: double exposure photography, ethereal blend, silhouette overlay with landscape texture, artistic composition, melancholic mood, fine art photography
styles.negative_prompt: single exposure, flat, ordinary, no overlay
styles.system_instruction: Apply double exposure aesthetic. Preserve main subject. Add: ethereal texture overlay (forest, mountains or abstract patterns) blended into shadow areas of the subject, fine art photography quality, artistic mood, soft transitions between layers.

styles.name: #sun-bleached-summer
styles.description: Verão estourado pelo sol — highlights queimados, cores desbotadas, mood nostálgico de praia.
styles.prompt_suffix: sun-bleached summer photography, faded warm tones, blown out highlights, hazy atmosphere, beach nostalgia, vintage holiday feel, sunlight overexposure
styles.negative_prompt: moody, dark, cool tones, indoor lighting
styles.system_instruction: Apply sun-bleached summer treatment. Preserve subject. Apply: lifted/faded shadows, slightly blown highlights with warm cream cast, reduced contrast, hazy atmosphere, vintage summer feel, washed-out warm color palette.

styles.name: #ink-print-monochrome
styles.description: Tinta sumi-e japonesa — pinceladas em tinta nanquim, papel washi, simplicidade Zen.
styles.prompt_suffix: Japanese sumi-e ink painting, brush strokes, washi paper texture, minimalist composition, Zen aesthetic, traditional black ink, calligraphic quality
styles.negative_prompt: color, photorealistic, busy, Western style
styles.system_instruction: Convert to Japanese sumi-e ink painting. Preserve subject silhouette and composition. Apply: black ink brush strokes only, varying line thickness with calligraphic quality, washi paper texture, minimalist negative space, traditional Zen aesthetic.

styles.name: #glitch-vhs
styles.description: Estética de fita VHS — chromatic aberration, scan lines, distorções analógicas.
styles.prompt_suffix: VHS aesthetic, chromatic aberration, scan lines, analog video distortion, RGB color shift, magnetic tape glitch, 80s home video feel, retro lo-fi
styles.negative_prompt: clean, modern, digital, sharp, high definition
styles.system_instruction: Apply VHS glitch aesthetic. Preserve composition. Apply: RGB chromatic aberration (red and blue channel offset), horizontal scan lines, slight magnetic tape distortion, lo-fi color quality, analog video noise, 80s home video character.

styles.name: #studio-product-clean
styles.description: Foto de produto de estúdio — fundo limpo, iluminação técnica, qualidade catálogo premium.
styles.prompt_suffix: professional studio product photography, clean background, technical lighting, soft shadows, catalog quality, e-commerce ready, sharp details, color accurate
styles.negative_prompt: moody, atmospheric, lifestyle, cluttered background
styles.system_instruction: Apply studio product photography treatment. Preserve subject exactly. Apply: clean controlled lighting, soft well-defined shadows, neutral white balance, sharp commercial detail, color-accurate rendering, premium catalog quality. Subject is hero — no atmospheric effects.
